title: Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
description:
On Monday, the courtroom battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over alleged broken promises at OpenAI started, as usual, with jury selection. The only tricky part? A lot of the prospective jurors already have an opinion about Elon Musk, and it's not a good one.
The Verge reporter Elizabeth Lopatto, who was there at the courthouse, quoted statements from some of the juror questionnaires: 
"Elon Musk is a greedy, racist, homophobic piece of garbage."
"Elon Musk is a world-class jerk."
"I very much dislike Tesla. As a woman of color, I am very aware of the damaging statements and actions Elon Musk has enacted and been a part of."
M …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Am Montag begann der Gerichtsstreit zwischen Elon Musk und Sam Altman wegen angeblich gebrochener Versprechen bei OpenAI wie üblich mit der Auswahl der Jury. Der einzig knifflige Teil? Viele der angehenden Juroren haben bereits eine Meinung über Elon Musk, und diese ist nicht gut. Die Verge-Reporterin Elizabeth Lopatto...
titleDE: Auswahl der Jury im Fall Musk gegen Altman: „Die Leute mögen ihn nicht“

title: Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube
description:
Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search experience for YouTube. The company is now testing "a new way to search on YouTube that feels more like a conversation," with results pulling in things like longform videos, YouTube Shorts, and text about what you're searching for. The "experiment" is now available if you're a YouTube Premium subscriber in the US who is 18 or older.
I turned it on for my account. Now, in the search bar, I see an "Ask YouTube" button, and clicking the search bar shows prompts to ask like "funny baby elephant playing clips," "summary of the rules of volleyball," and "short history of the Apollo 11 moon landing." If  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Google testet ein KI-Modus-ähnliches Sucherlebnis für YouTube. Das Unternehmen testet derzeit „eine neue Art der Suche auf YouTube, die sich eher wie eine Konversation anfühlt“, wobei die Ergebnisse Dinge wie lange Videos, YouTube-Shorts und Text zu dem, wonach Sie suchen, einschließen. Das „Experiment“ ist nun ...
titleDE: Google testet die KI-Chatbot-Suche für YouTube

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
description: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. Ahead of OpenAI’s highly anticipated IPO, the court could rule on whether the company is allowed to exist as a for-profit enterprise and might even oust…
descriptionDE: Nach einem jahrelangen Rechtsstreit stehen Elon Musk und OpenAI-CEO Sam Altman diese Woche in Nordkalifornien vor Gericht, in einem Fall, der weitreichende Folgen haben könnte. Vor dem mit Spannung erwarteten Börsengang von OpenAI könnte das Gericht darüber entscheiden, ob das Unternehmen als gewinnorientiertes Unternehmen bestehen darf ...
titleDE: Elon Musk und Sam Altman streiten über die Zukunft von OpenAI

title: Canonical lays out a plan for AI in Ubuntu Linux
description:
One of the most popular Linux distributions is about to get an influx of AI features. As reported by Phoronix, Jon Seager, VP of engineering at Ubuntu developer Canonical, shared a blog post on Monday detailing plans to add AI features to the Linux distro over the next year. As the post states, the AI features "will come in two forms: first as a means of enhancing existing OS functionality with AI models in the background, and latterly in the form of 'AI native' features and workflows for those who want them." 
These features will range from accessibility tools like improved speech-to-text and text-to-speech to agentic AI features for tasks …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Eine der beliebtesten Linux-Distributionen wird bald mit KI-Funktionen ausgestattet sein. Wie von Phoronix berichtet, veröffentlichte Jon Seager, VP of Engineering beim Ubuntu-Entwickler Canonical, am Montag einen Blog-Beitrag, in dem er Pläne detailliert beschreibt, im Laufe des nächsten Jahres KI-Funktionen zur Linux-Distribution hinzuzufügen. Wie es in dem Beitrag heißt, ...
titleDE: Canonical legt einen Plan für KI in Ubuntu Linux vor

title: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
description:
Google CEO Sundar Pichai arrives for the inauguration of President Donald Trump. | Getty Images	

Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. Its organizers claim many of the signers work in Google's DeepMind AI lab, and include more than 20 principals, directors, and vice presidents. 
According to the Post, the letter says that "The only way to guarantee that Google does not become associated with such harms is to reject any classified workloads. Otherwise, such uses may occur without our knowledge or the power to stop them."  Anthropic is currently in a legal battle with the Pentagon over being …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Google-Chef Sundar Pichai kommt zur Amtseinführung von Präsident Donald Trump. | Getty Images Über 600 Google-Mitarbeiter haben einen Brief an CEO Sundar Pichai unterzeichnet, in dem sie Google auffordern, das Pentagon daran zu hindern, seine KI-Modelle für geheime Zwecke zu verwenden, berichtet die Washington Post. Seine Organisatoren k...
titleDE: Google-Mitarbeiter bitten Sundar Pichai, Nein zum geheimen militärischen KI-Einsatz zu sagen

title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data

titleDE: David Silver von DeepMind hat gerade 1,1 Milliarden US-Dollar gesammelt, um eine KI zu entwickeln, die ohne menschliche Daten lernt

title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
description:
OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped.
On Monday morning, Microsoft announced a handful of big changes to its long-standing OpenAI deal. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's "primary cloud partner, and OpenAI products will ship first on Azure, unless Microsoft cannot and chooses not to support the necessary capabilities." But OpenAI can "now serve all its products to customers across any cloud provider." That lets OpenAI pursue its goals of courting enterprise custom …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Die Partnerschaft zwischen OpenAI und Microsoft ist jetzt noch weniger engagiert. Und eine Klausel über künstliche allgemeine Intelligenz, die jahrelang die Zukunft ihres Deals bestimmte, wurde offiziell gestrichen. Am Montagmorgen kündigte Microsoft eine Handvoll großer Änderungen an seinem langjährigen...
titleDE: Die berühmte AGI-Vereinbarung zwischen Microsoft und OpenAI ist tot

title: The missing step between hype and profit
description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. In February, I picked up a flyer at an anti-AI march in London. I can’t say for sure whether or not its writers meant to riff on South Park’s underpants gnomes. But…

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
description:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are set to face off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of tech’s leading AI startup, OpenAI. The trial begins with jury selection on April 27th, as Musk pushes forward his 2024 lawsuit that accuses OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and cofounder Greg Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
			
We have a jury.
			
Elon Musk’s lawyer tried to get some jurors thrown out for disliking Musk.
			
Apparently things are exciting outside.
			
We have gone through the first 20 potential jurors.
			
Voir dire has begun.
			
The Elon Musk vs. OpenAI trial starts today.
			
Elon Musk drops fraud claims against OpenAI and Sam Altman before trial.
			
Musk vs. Altman is here, and it’s going to get messy
			
Elon Musk is about to be a very busy boy!
			
‘Sideshow’ concerns and billionaire dreams: What I learned from Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI
			
Elon Musk’s xAI is suing OpenAI and Apple
			
Inside Elon Musk’s messy breakup with OpenAI
			
Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman again
descriptionDE: Sam Altman und Elon Musk werden in einem hochriskanten Prozess gegeneinander antreten, der die Zukunft des führenden KI-Startups im Technologiebereich, OpenAI, verändern könnte. Der Prozess beginnt mit der Auswahl der Geschworenen am 27. April, während Musk seine Klage für 2024 vorantreibt, in der er OpenAI beschuldigt, seine Gründungsmission der Entwicklung von KI aufgegeben zu haben, um ...
titleDE: Elon Musk und Sam Altmans Gerichtsstreit um die Zukunft von OpenAI

title: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces ‘Palestine’ in designs
description:
I suddenly feel so much better about every embarrassing typo I’ve ever made. | Original Illustration (left) by Agathe Singer	

One of Canva's new AI features has been caught replacing the word "Palestine" in designs. The Magic Layers feature - which is designed to break flat images out into separate editable components - isn't supposed to make visible alterations to user designs, but it was found by X user @ros_ie9 to automatically switch the phrase "cats for Palestine" to "cats for Ukraine."
The issue was seemingly limited specifically to the word "Palestine," as @ros_ie9 noted that related words like "Gaza" were unaffected by the feature. Canva says it has now resolved the issue and is taking steps to prevent it from happening again.
"We became aware of an issue …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Mit jedem peinlichen Tippfehler, den ich jemals gemacht habe, fühle ich mich plötzlich so viel besser. | Originalillustration (links) von Agathe Singer Es wurde festgestellt, dass eine der neuen KI-Funktionen von Canva das Wort „Palästina“ in Designs ersetzt. Die Magic Layers-Funktion – die dazu dient, flache Bilder in separate E... aufzuteilen.
titleDE: Canva entschuldigt sich, nachdem sein KI-Tool „Palästina“ in Designs ersetzt hat

description: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. While consumer-facing AI tools have dazzled users with speed and ease, enterprise leaders are discovering that deploying AI at scale requires something far less glamorous but far more consequential: data…

Während verbraucherorientierte KI-Tools die Benutzer mit ihrer Geschwindigkeit und Benutzerfreundlichkeit begeistern, entdecken Unternehmensleiter, dass der Einsatz von KI ...

title: The AI-designed car is taking shape
description:
The auto design world is full of advanced 3D visualization tools and VR sculpting platforms, but your average new car still enters the world as a sketch. 
Those sketches traditionally see endless iteration and refinement from all angles before being turned into 3D models by hand, some dying in the digital world, others sculpted into clay to better visualize lines and profiles. That's just the beginning of a design and development process that often takes a half-decade or more. 
That means many new cars hitting dealerships this summer were first sketched in 2020 or 2021, initiatives kicked off when alternative fuel incentives were widesprea …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Die Welt des Autodesigns ist voll von fortschrittlichen 3D-Visualisierungstools und VR-Bildhauerplattformen, aber Ihr durchschnittliches neues Auto kommt immer noch als Skizze auf die Welt. Diese Skizzen unterliegen traditionell einer endlosen Wiederholung und Verfeinerung aus allen Blickwinkeln, bevor sie von Hand in 3D-Modelle umgewandelt werden, wobei einige im Di...
titleDE: Das von KI entworfene Auto nimmt Gestalt an

title: How Project Maven taught the military to love AI
description:
In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the "shock and awe" attack on Iraq over two decades ago. This acceleration was made possible by AI systems that speed up the targeting process. Chief among them is the Maven Smart System.
In her new book, Project Maven: A Marine Colonel, His Team, and the Dawn of AI Warfare, journalist Katrina Manson investigates the development of Maven from its inception in 2017 as an experiment in applying computer vision to drone footage. The project spurred employee protests at Google, the military's initial contractor, prompting the …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: In den ersten 24 Stunden des Angriffs auf den Iran hat das US-Militär mehr als 1.000 Ziele angegriffen, fast doppelt so viel wie der „Shock and Awe“-Angriff auf den Irak vor über zwei Jahrzehnten. Möglich wurde diese Beschleunigung durch KI-Systeme, die den Zielprozess beschleunigen. Der wichtigste unter ihnen ist der Maven Smart...
titleDE: Wie Project Maven dem Militär beibrachte, KI zu lieben

title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI

title: AirPods, Touch Bars, and the rest of Tim Cook’s legacy

We knew at some point Tim Cook would step down from his position as Apple's CEO. Over the last year, it has become increasingly obvious that John Ternus was his likely successor. The news this week was still a surprise, though - and this year's succession could lead to some important changes at the most influential company in tech.

On this episode of The Vergecast, David and Nilay are joined by Daring Fireball's John Gruber to talk about their reactions to the news, the (mostly …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Wir wussten, dass Tim Cook irgendwann von seiner Position als CEO von Apple zurücktreten würde. Im Laufe des letzten Jahres wurde immer deutlicher, dass John Ternus sein wahrscheinlicher Nachfolger war. Die Neuigkeiten dieser Woche waren jedoch dennoch eine Überraschung – und die diesjährige Nachfolge könnte zu einigen wichtigen Änderungen bei der ... führen.

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
description: I don’t need to tell you that AI is everywhere. Or that it is being used, increasingly, in hospitals. Doctors are using AI to help them with note-taking.
